contentBlocks.original:
श्रीविष्णुषट्पदी
अविनयमपनय विष्णो दमय मनः शमय विषयमृगतृष्णाम् ।
भूतदयां विस्तारय तारय संसारसागरतः ॥ १॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
śrīviṣṇuṣaṭpadī
avinayamapanaya viṣṇo damaya manaḥ śamaya viṣayamṛgatṛṣṇām .
bhūtadayāṃ vistāraya tāraya saṃsārasāgarataḥ .. 1..
contentBlocks.translation: O Vishnu, remove arrogance, subdue my mind, and calm the thirst for worldly desires. Expand compassion towards all beings, and guide me across the ocean of worldly existence.
contentBlocks.meanings: श्रीविष्णुषट्पदी (śrīviṣṇuṣaṭpadī) – O Vishnu, six-footed (śrī:O | viṣṇu:Vishnu | ṣaṭpadī:six-footed); अविनयम् (avinayam) – arrogance; अपनय (apanaya) – remove; विष्णो (viṣṇo) – O Vishnu; दमय (damaya) – subdue; मनः (manaḥ) – mind; शमय (śamaya) – calm; विषयमृगतृष्णाम् (viṣayamṛgatṛṣṇām) – thirst for worldly desires (viṣaya:worldly desires | mṛgatṛṣṇām:thirst); भूतदयाम् (bhūtadayām) – compassion towards beings (bhūta:beings | dayām:compassion); विस्तारय (vistāraya) – expand; तारय (tāraya) – guide across; संसारसागरतः (saṃsārasāgarataḥ) – ocean of worldly existence (saṃsāra:worldly existence | sāgarataḥ:ocean of);

contentBlocks.translation: In the divine nectar of bliss, with the fragrance of true existence, I bow to the lotus feet of the Lord, which dispel the sorrows of existence.
contentBlocks.meanings: दिव्यधुनीमकरन्दे (divyadhunīmakarande) – in the divine nectar (divya:divine | dhunī:nectar | makarande:in the nectar); परिमलपरिभोगसच्चिदानन्दे (parimalaparibhogasaccidānande) – with the fragrance of true existence (parimala:fragrance | paribhoga:enjoyment | sat:true | cit:consciousness | ānande:in bliss); श्रीपतिपदारविन्दे (śrīpatipadāravinde) – to the lotus feet of the Lord (śrīpati:Lord | padāravinde:to the lotus feet); भवभयखेदच्छिदे (bhavabhayakhedacchide) – which dispel the sorrows of existence (bhava:existence | bhaya:fear | kheda:sorrows | cchide:which dispel); वन्दे (vande) – I bow;

contentBlocks.original:
सत्यपि भेदापगमे नाथ तवाहं न मामकीनस्त्वम् ।
सामुद्रो हि तरङ्गः क्वचन समुद्रो न तारङ्गः ॥ ३॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
satyapi bhedāpagame nātha tavāhaṃ na māmakīnastvam .
sāmudro hi taraṅgaḥ kvacana samudro na tāraṅgaḥ .. 3..
contentBlocks.translation: O Lord, even in the dissolution of differences, I am yours, and you are mine; like the ocean and its waves, one cannot exist without the other.
contentBlocks.meanings: सत्यपि (satyapi) – even in truth (satya:truth | api:even); भेदापगमे (bhedāpagame) – in the dissolution of differences (bheda:differences | apagame:in the dissolution); नाथ (nātha) – O Lord; तव (tava) – your; अहम् (aham) – I am; न (na) – not; मामकीनः (māmakīnaḥ) – mine; त्वम् (tvam) – you; सामुद्रः (sāmudraḥ) – oceanic; हि (hi) – indeed; तरङ्गः (taraṅgaḥ) – wave; क्वचन (kvacana) – somewhere; समुद्रः (samudraḥ) – ocean; न (na) – not; तारङ्गः (tāraṅgaḥ) – wave;

contentBlocks.original:
उद्धृतनग नगभिदनुज दनुजकुलामित्र मित्रशशिदृष्टे ।
दृष्टे भवति प्रभवति न भवति किं भवतिरस्कारः ॥ ४॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
uddhṛtanaga nagabhidanuja danujakulāmitra mitraśaśidṛṣṭe .
dṛṣṭe bhavati prabhavati na bhavati kiṃ bhavatiraskāraḥ .. 4..
contentBlocks.translation: O Lord, who uplifts the mountains and protects the kin of demons, those who see you are blessed. Whether you manifest or not, what remains unfulfilled in your presence?
contentBlocks.meanings: उद्धृतनग (uddhṛtanaga) – uplifts the mountains (uddhṛta:uplifted | naga:mountain); नगभिदनुज (nagabhidanuja) – kin of mountain-splitter (naga:mountain | bhid:splitter | anuja:younger brother); दनुजकुलामित्र (danujakulāmitra) – protector of demon kin (danuja:demon | kula:family | amitra:enemy); मित्रशशिदृष्टे (mitraśaśidṛṣṭe) – seen by friend and moon (mitra:friend | śaśi:moon | dṛṣṭe:seen); दृष्टे (dṛṣṭe) – seen; भवति (bhavati) – becomes; प्रभवति (prabhavati) – manifests; न (na) – not; भवति (bhavati) – becomes; किं (kiṃ) – what; भवतिरस्कारः (bhavatiraskāraḥ) – unfulfilled in your presence (bhava:presence | tiraskāraḥ:neglect);

contentBlocks.original:
मत्स्यादिभिरवतारैरवतारवताऽवता सदा वसुधाम् ।
परमेश्वर परिपाल्यो भवता भवतापभीतोऽहम् ॥ ५॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
matsyādibhiravatārairavatāravatā'vatā sadā vasudhām .
parameśvara paripālyo bhavatā bhavatāpabhīto'ham .. 5..
contentBlocks.translation: O Supreme Lord, who takes various forms, you are always the protector of the earth through your incarnations. I am afraid of the fears of existence; please protect me.
contentBlocks.meanings: मत्स्यादिभिः (matsyādibhiḥ) – by incarnations like Matsya (matsya:Matsya | ādi:and others | bhiḥ:by); अवतारैः (avatāraiḥ) – by incarnations; अवतारवताऽवता (avatāravatā'vatā) – by the one with incarnations (avatāra:incarnation | vatā:with); सदा (sadā) – always; वसुधाम् (vasudhām) – the earth; परमेश्वर (parameśvara) – O Supreme Lord; परिपाल्यः (paripālyaḥ) – to be protected; भवता (bhavatā) – by you; भवतापभीतः (bhavatāpabhītaḥ) – afraid of worldly fears (bhava:worldly existence | tāpa:fears | bhītaḥ:afraid); अहम् (aham) – I;

contentBlocks.original:
दामोदर गुणमन्दिर सुन्दरवदनारविन्द गोविन्द ।
भवजलधिमथनमन्दर परमं दरमपनय त्वं मे ॥ ६॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
dāmodara guṇamandira sundaravadanāravinda govinda .
bhavajaladhimathanamandara paramaṃ daramapanaya tvaṃ me .. 6..
contentBlocks.translation: O Govinda, the embodiment of all virtues, whose beautiful lotus-like face shines with grace, please help me overcome the ocean of existence.
contentBlocks.meanings: दामोदर (dāmodara) – Damodara; गुणमन्दिर (guṇamandira) – abode of virtues (guṇa:virtues | mandira:abode); सुन्दरवदनारविन्द (sundaravadanāravinda) – beautiful lotus-like face (sundara:beautiful | vadana:face | aravinda:lotus-like); गोविन्द (govinda) – Govinda; भवजलधिमथनमन्दर (bhavajaladhimathanamandara) – churner of the ocean of existence (bhava:existence | jaladhi:ocean | mathana:churning | mandara:churner); परमं (paramaṃ) – supreme; दरम् (daram) – fear; अपनय (apanaya) – remove; त्वं (tvaṃ) – you; मे (me) – my;

contentBlocks.original:
नारायण करुणामय शरणं करवाणि तावकौ चरणौ ।
इति षट्पदी मदीये वदनसरोजे सदा वसतु ॥ ७॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
nārāyaṇa karuṇāmaya śaraṇaṃ karavāṇi tāvakau caraṇau .
iti ṣaṭpadī madīye vadanasaroje sadā vasatu .. 7..
contentBlocks.translation: O Narayana, the embodiment of compassion, I take refuge at your lotus feet. May my heart always dwell at your lotus-like face.
contentBlocks.meanings: नारायण (nārāyaṇa) – Narayana; करुणामय (karuṇāmaya) – embodiment of compassion (karuṇā:compassion | maya:embodiment of); शरणं (śaraṇaṃ) – refuge; करवाणि (karavāṇi) – I take; तावकौ (tāvakau) – your; चरणौ (caraṇau) – feet; इति (iti) – thus; षट्पदी (ṣaṭpadī) – six-footed verse (ṣaṭ:six | padī:footed); मदीये (madīye) – my; वदनसरोजे (vadanasarojé) – lotus-like face (vadana:face | saroja:lotus-like); सदा (sadā) – always; वसतु (vasatu) – may dwell;

contentBlocks.translation: Thus ends the Vishnuṣaṭpadī composed by Sri Shankaracharya.
contentBlocks.meanings: इति (iti) – thus; श्रीमद् (śrīmad) – venerable; शङ्कराचार्यविरचितं (śaṅkarācāryaviracitaṃ) – composed by Shankaracharya (śaṅkara:Shankara | ācārya:teacher | viracitaṃ:composed); विष्णुषट्पदीस्तोत्रं (viṣṇuṣaṭpadīstotraṃ) – Vishnuṣaṭpadī hymn (viṣṇu:Vishnu | ṣaṭpadī:six-footed | stotraṃ:hymn); सम्पूर्णम् (sampūrṇam) – complete;
